generatedItinerary.preJourneySummary: Your thrilling luxury journey to Tokyo (NRT) is officially mapped out! This itinerary combines standard check-in details, top-tier leisure walks, local food discoveries, and dynamic micro-excursions. Perfectly optimized for 16 days.

days.title: Exploring the hidden gems of Tokyo (NRT)
days.morning: Begin with an orientation stroll around central Tokyo (NRT). Drop into a highly recommended local breakfast cafe, order native coffee/tea, and map out the morning scenic highlights.
days.afternoon: Dive deep into standard neighborhood alleys, craft markets, or major history museums. Experience native crafts first-hand and grab a healthy lunch recommended by locals.
days.evening: Secure dinner tables at a highly review-rated bistro in the city center. Walk through the beautifully lit canals or standard public boardwalks under the stars before rest.

dining: Local street food stalls on the main Tokyo (NRT) market lane
The Terrace Lounge — popular for authentic traditional recipes
Café Horizon — top-rated specialty brews and local pastries
culturalTips: Keep a copy of your travel documents handy on your phone.
Cash is preferred for small transit rides and street vendor stalls.
Greet shopkeepers with classic local greetings.
packingList: Light waterproof jacket for random showers
Power adapters and portable power banks
Comfortable sneakers for intensive walking routes

extractedInfo.notes: Gate 4, Economy Class, Departs SFO 1:45 PM. Seat 22K.
